visual_description: The scene is viewed through a window into a dimly lit room. Two men are visible inside; one with white hair in a black shirt is seated, while the other, in a grey shirt, stands and leans forward. A large, ornate, golden statue is displayed on the wall behind them.
audio_description: A low, sustained, and ominous musical tone plays throughout the clip.
